HERMÈS Herbag A Dos Backpack 2-in-1 (Size 31 & 29)

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Herbag A Dos (Backpack)
Material: Vache Hunter Leather and Waffle Canvas (Toile)
Color: Gold (Brown) Leather paired with Beige / Off-White Canvas
Dimensions: Includes two interchangeable canvas bodies - Horizontal 31 cm and Vertical 29 cm
Accessories Included: Full original set (Includes both interchangeable canvas bags)

Product Features:
This is a highly sought-after and rare combination. Exceptionally practical and spacious, it can easily fit a 13-inch or 14-inch laptop.

Condition Report:
Excellent / Like New condition. The item is impeccably preserved, showing practically no signs of wear and looking just like a brand new piece. It is extremely rare to find this complete set in such original pristine condition with rising market value. Please review all photos carefully before placing your order.
